hero.name: Shaimaa Dwedar
hero.subtitle: Computer Engineering Graduate
hero.description: Full-Stack Developer, Flutter Developer, and AI & IoT Enthusiast building intelligent web applications, mobile solutions, AI-powered platforms, and embedded systems that solve real-world problems.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Computer Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in Full-Stack Development, Flutter Applications, Artificial Intelligence, and IoT Systems.
about.description: Throughout my academic and personal projects, I have designed and developed complete software solutions ranging from responsive web applications and Flutter mobile apps to AI-powered platforms and ESP32-based automation systems. I enjoy transforming ideas into practical products through clean architecture, scalable backend systems, modern technologies, and user-focused design.

education.degreeDesc: Computer Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in building full-stack web applications, mobile solutions, AI-powered platforms, and IoT systems.
education.traineeDesc: Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter, implemented modern UI/UX practices, integrated APIs, and gained practical experience in software development workflows.
education.learningDesc: Built AI-powered platforms, IoT systems, mobile applications, and full-stack projects through continuous learning and hands-on implementation.

tasks: Integrated REST APIs and backend services.
Participated in software testing and debugging.

pizzaGo.name: Pizza Go
pizzaGo.description: Smart pizza ordering and automated preparation system integrating online ordering, payment processing, PostgreSQL database management, MQTT communication, and ESP32-controlled hardware automation into one complete end-to-end solution.

ideasTracker.name: Ideas Tracker
ideasTracker.description: AI-powered platform for capturing, organizing, enhancing, and sharing ideas using voice input, intelligent assistance, mind maps, and community collaboration features.

timeCapsule.name: Time Capsule
timeCapsule.description: Flutter application that allows users to create digital time capsules containing memories, messages, images, and files that automatically unlock at future dates.

cvEvaluation.name: CV Evaluation System
cvEvaluation.description: AI-based system for evaluating resumes using Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning techniques to provide automated candidate assessment and scoring.

whereShouldIGo.name: Where Should I Go?
whereShouldIGo.description: Smart recommendation platform that suggests destinations and activities based on user mood, preferences, available time, and location.

coffeeLab.name: Coffee Lab
coffeeLab.description: Flutter mobile application developed using MVVM and Clean Architecture principles, focusing on scalable mobile development and maintainable code structure.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: I am always open to discussing new projects, collaboration opportunities, and innovative ideas. Feel free to reach out.
